title: Disable Dependabot after Renovate trial run
body:
### Feature request description

This repository is migrating over to Renovate for dependency/security automated updates, given it's enhanced configuration/capabilities and centralized management. For the time being, both tools will be enabled so that we may catch any "missing" update problems.

### Suggest potential solution

After 30-ish days, the .github/dependabot.yml file should be removed and Dependabot disabled in the repo. settings.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

Renovate is the alternative

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body:
copying from https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18044#issuecomment-1503002662
The `test/tools/go.mod` is not covered AFAICT.

Also renovate PRs should set the `release-note-none` label
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/6f2a61a1566c8e499629c12a4943ccae90a24173/.github/dependabot.yml#L8

Good catch @Luap99 

I believe the default ignore list includes `test`.  Let me see how best to override that.

Renovate seems to propose updates for retracted releases, https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18296
Is there any setting to turn that off?

Thanks @Luap99 IIRC there was an issue fixed WRT rollback PRs but I still have [a workaround in the default configuration](https://github.com/containers/automation/blob/394eeb9da7edd9f7b9e8a7569183854c723903ed/renovate/defaults.json5#L137-L146).  I'll remove that, but my memory is far from perfect, so please let me know if the problem keeps happening or gets worse.

Opened https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/134

Just following up on the `rollbackPrs` mess I made.  @Luap99 I ran into this issue previously and was hoping it was resolved, [clearly it's still broken](https://github.com/renovatebot/renovate/issues/13012).  So these will need to be handled manually, one-by-one for now :disappointed: 

That said, if there's a dep. that keeps popping up as broken, there's [another way we can hard-code versions to be ignored](https://github.com/containers/automation/blob/1e0ff5ac1721208197b550e35b8e7939b0896e17/renovate/defaults.json5#L84-L91).  Though closing the update PR is acceptable as well, the configuration change will guarantee it's never proposed anywhere.
